case_title: CHING SUN WONG et al VS. SERRAN BROWN et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-29-2002 CONTINUED TO JUL-08-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). APR-29-2002 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
